title: TPMA and SIM to form joint venture
body: PT Trans Power Marine Tbk (TPMA) and PT Samudra Investama Maju (SIM) establish a joint venture in order to acquire 20 sets of tug and barge vessels, as well as 2 units of floating cranes, within the next three years.

title: JCI slowed down at early afternoon session
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was still sluggish until 1.30 PM WIB since morning bell at 10 AM WIB today (9/9).

title: Issuing IDR 1 trillion bond, HRTA to refinance debts and expand retail outlets
body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Year 2024 of IDR 1 trillion. The proceeds of this corporate action will be used to expand retail outlets for gold bars, as well as pay maturing bond principal.

title: Tudung Putra Putri Jaya only owns 10% of Garudafood (GOOD) after releasing 894 million shares
body: On Wednesday, September 4, PT Tudung Putra Putri Jaya released PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) shares once more, with a volume of 894.35 million shares. This investor's stake in the food and beverage company has decreased to just 10% from its previous 12.42% of shares. However, Garudafood chairman and investor Sudhamek Agoeng Waspodo Soenjoto increased his ownership stake by 296.29 million shares, making him an 8% owner overall. The organizer of both transactions was PT Indo Premier Sekuritas.

title: Foreign trading volume remains steady at 1.8 billion shares with net surplus of 33.63 million shares
body: Foreign investors were reported buying and selling stocks on Thursday, September 5, with nearly equal results, with the foreign buying volume was 1.84 billion shares and the foreign selling volume was 1.81 billion shares. These activities then resulted in a net foreign volume surplus of 33.63 million shares. The industrial area development business PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) and the domestic and foreign shipping services company PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) took the top spot on the share purchase list, with a net volume of roughly 43 million shares each. This amount was established after foreign investors purchased 47.77 million KIJA shares and 53.21 million BULL shares.

title: TPMA and SIM to form joint venture
body: PT Trans Power Marine Tbk (TPMA) and PT Samudra Investama Maju (SIM) establish a joint venture in order to acquire 20 sets of tug and barge vessels, as well as 2 units of floating cranes, within the next three years.

title: JCI slowed down at early afternoon session
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was still sluggish until 1.30 PM WIB since morning bell at 10 AM WIB today (9/9).

body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Year 2024 of IDR 1 trillion. The proceeds of this corporate action will be used to expand retail outlets for gold bars, as well as pay maturing bond principal.

body: On Wednesday, September 4, PT Tudung Putra Putri Jaya released PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) shares once more, with a volume of 894.35 million shares. This investor's stake in the food and beverage company has decreased to just 10% from its previous 12.42% of shares. However, Garudafood chairman and investor Sudhamek Agoeng Waspodo Soenjoto increased his ownership stake by 296.29 million shares, making him an 8% owner overall. The organizer of both transactions was PT Indo Premier Sekuritas.

title: Foreign trading volume remains steady at 1.8 billion shares with net surplus of 33.63 million shares
body: Foreign investors were reported buying and selling stocks on Thursday, September 5, with nearly equal results, with the foreign buying volume was 1.84 billion shares and the foreign selling volume was 1.81 billion shares. These activities then resulted in a net foreign volume surplus of 33.63 million shares. The industrial area development business PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) and the domestic and foreign shipping services company PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) took the top spot on the share purchase list, with a net volume of roughly 43 million shares each. This amount was established after foreign investors purchased 47.77 million KIJA shares and 53.21 million BULL shares.

title: Ancora secures loan facility of IDR 150 billion for refinancing shareholder loan
body: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk (OKAS) obtains a loan facility with a maximum limit of IDR 150 billion from PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN).

title: August 2024 saw increases in forex reserves
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) reported an increase in forex reserves in August 2024 following a decline back in February 2024.

title: Following IPO gratification controversy, IDX to renew regulation
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authority will modify the regulation in the stock market to increase the quality of listed companies, following the controversy of gratification for IPO, leading to contract termination of several employees.

title: Weekend saw JCI breaking new records
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) broke another record throughout today’s (6/9) session.

title: ABBA’s shareholders agreed on board reshuffle
body: Shareholders collectively agreed upon the discharge of two commissioners and two directors of PT Mahaka Media Tbk (ABBA) in Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders yesterday (4/9).

title: Now approved, WIFI to set up rights issue for refinancing purposes
body: Shareholders of PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI) agreed upon the plan of a rights issue of 4.71 billion shares or equal to 66.67% of issued and paid-up capital.

title: Mandala Multifinance to issue bonus shares worth IDR 117.5 billion
body: PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk (MFIN), a consumer financing company, plans to distribute bonus shares worth IDR 117.5 billion.

title: Signing the 2024-2026 Joint Working Agreement, BRI and the Workers' Union Strengthen Industrial Relations
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BRI) signed the Joint Working Agreement (PKB) for the 2024-2026 period with the BRI National Workers' Union at BRI BRILiaN Tower, Jakarta (28/08).

title: MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia to spin-off sharia business line
body: PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk (LIFE), a life insurance company, will initiate a spin-off of its sharia business unit.

title: Tempo Inti Media's digital business now funded by MDIF
body: PT Info Media Digital (IMD), a digital business line under PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk (TMPO), has secured funding from Media Development Investment Fund (MDIF).

title: JCI stays at green zone, but slowing down
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slowed down and arrived at 7,688.17 nearing the closing of today’s (5/9) session. It is lower than 7,714.08 recorded in the morning session today.

title: Pefindo to raise VOKS’s rating to “idBBB+”
body: PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS), a cable manufacturer company, has now secured “idBBB+” rating from Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) for Series B of Bond I Year 2019, which is still circulating in the public now, from the initial “idBBB”.

title: The Soenjoto family increased their stake in Garudafood (GOOD)
body: Three private investors increased their holdings in PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk, a manufacturer of food and beverage products, on Tuesday, September 3. The first of the three investors, Pangayoman Adi Soenjoto, increased his portion to 8.54% by purchasing an additional 418.57 million shares of GOOD. The other two investors are also members of the Soenjoto family. Kusumo Dewiningrum Sunjoto purchased 415.87 million shares, giving a final 8.81% ownership stake. Rahajoe Dewiningroem Soenjoto also acquired 402 million shares, bringing the total ownership of the company to approximately 6.6%.

title: 21 issuers under special monitoring of IDX
body: Throughout August 2024, Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities put 21 issuers under special monitoring, mostly due to their stock prices that do not go over IDR 51 per share in the regular market.

title: Gov’t to hold another state sukuk auction, now eyeing IDR 8 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold another round of auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on September 10, 2024.

title: History of conflict, BYAN now takes over Enggang Alam Sawita
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN) and its subsidiary, PT Bayan Energy (BE), is acquiring the entire shares of PT Berau Utama Berkatsetia (BUB) in PT Enggang Alam Sawita (EAS) for IDR 105.14 billion.

title: Solid Capital, BRI's Profits to be Distributed through Dividends
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BRI will continue to distribute dividends with an optimal dividend payout ratio, as the company's capital is still deemed solid.

title: First half down, PEHA booked loss
body: The performance of PT Phapros Tbk (PEHA) slowed down in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Foreign selling volume recorded higher, net foreign volume falls to -401.16 million shares
body: Share-selling transactions by foreign investors on Wednesday, September 4, resulted in a larger foreign selling volume (2.23 billion shares) compared to foreign buying volume (1.82 billion shares). As a result, net foreign volume dropped to -401.16 million shares. Furthermore, the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) received the greatest buys, with around 336.70 million shares purchased for a net volume of 99.08 million shares.

title: Cutthroat competition, Gojek withdraws from Vietnam
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) finally decides to depart pull back from Vietnam, effective starting September 16, 2024, after operating since 2018.

title: Nearly 30 million Woori Finance Indonesia (BPFI) shares sold by Batavia Prosperindo
body: The investor in PT Woori Finance Indonesia Tbk (BPFI), PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk, sold a total of 29.36 million shares of the company on Monday, September 2. Following the sale, which was organized by PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk, Batavia Prosperindo's share portion in this consumer financing issuer was reduced from 8.95% to 7.85%.

title: BREN’s subsidiary signs relaxation of USD 655 million credit
body: Star Energy Group Holdings Pte Ltd (SEGHPL), a subsidiary of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN), has signed a relaxation of interest and tenor of a credit facility worth USD 655 million from Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited, yesterday (2/9).

title: ENRG to guarantee subsidiary’s credit facility of USD 198 million
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an oil and gas company under Bakrie Group, has provided guarantee for a credit facility obtained by one of its subsidiaries, PT Imbang Tata Alam (ITA).

title: Cyanide import license on progress, Wilton Makmur confident of gold dore bars production target
body: PT Wilton Makmur Indonesia Tbk (SQMI) is targeting production capacity of 300 tons of gold per day in September 2024, as higher cyanide supply will expedite gold ore refinery.

title: Nev Stored Energy to set up tender offer for LABA’s shares
body: PT Nev Stored Energy (NSE) will initiate a voluntary tender offer for the shares of PT Green Power Group Tbk (LABA), a steel manufacturer formerly called PT Ladangbaja Murni Tbk.

title: SUN auction recorded IDR 45.48 trillion of incoming bids
body: Total incoming bids recorded in the last auction of Government Securities (SUN) on September 3, 2024 reached IDR 45.48 trillion.

title: Booking fantastic cash, Adira Finance to pay bonds of IDR 19 billion
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) or Adira Finance to pay off Shelf-Registration Bond of 2019 maturing on October 4, 2024.

title: 384.88 million of Gojek Tokopedia shares get sold, net foreign closed at -110.68 million shares
body: Foreign investors sold 384.88 million shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Tuesday, September 3, for a net volume of -52.03 million shares. This transaction added to the foreign sales volume, which stood at 2.26 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 2.15 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -110.68 million shares.

title: WIKA bags new Jetty 1 construction contract in Integrated Terminal Manggis
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) has secured the contract for the construction of new Jetty 1 in Integrated Terminal Manggis, Bali.

title: Bought on IPO proceeds, yet POLA’s office is on the verge of execution J
body: PT Pool Advista Finance Tbk (POLA) files an objection to Attorney General’s Office regarding the confiscation of POLA’s office building worth IDR 47.37 billion in North Grogol, Jakarta.
